property.description: An extraordinary person must achieve great things. Young hero, make your mark in this world!
property.name: Village Chief

property.description: A true master must have the strength to stand alone against ten thousand!
property.name: Royal City Battle Admin

property.description: After your adventures, relax in the hot spring and restore body and mind.
property.name: Hot Spring Proprietress

property.description: Not every gift-giving old man is Santa Claus!
property.name: Welfare Official

property.description: Fame, fortune, and rising ranks
property.name: Merit Envoy

property.description: The Demon Tower - endless EXP awaits!
property.name: Demon Tower Lower Teleporter

property.description: Want to level up fast? I have a special method I don't share with just anyone.
property.name: Leveling Envoy

property.description: Troubled by too many achievement points? Exchange them for powerful medals - users swear by them!
property.name: Medal Envoy

property.description: Artifacts and divine energy - hard to tell apart!
property.name: Artifact Envoy

property.description: Premium wings - an elite existence you deserve!
property.name: Spirit Feather Envoy

property.description: Welcome, adventurer! Want to try your luck?
property.name: Lottery Staff

property.description: I'm not a profiteer, don't say that!
property.name: Pharmacy Owner

property.description: Bring exchange vouchers to trade for premium brand items.
property.name: Event Envoy

property.name: Event Envoy

property.description: Bring exchange vouchers to trade for premium brand items.
property.name: Event Envoy

property.name: Event Envoy

property.description: The continent is in turmoil and monsters run rampant - heroes must rise up to slay them!
property.name: Demon Slayer Envoy

property.description: Want to become a bounty hunter? I can teach you - free of charge!
property.name: Bounty Hunter

property.description: Hello adventurer, welcome to Silver Moon Island!
property.name: Silver Moon Island Master

property.description: An old steed still dreams of galloping a thousand miles! Don't think I'm an easy target!
property.name: Veteran

property.description: Never let the enemy cross our defense line.
property.name: Guard

property.description: For a seasoned travelling merchant, there's business to be done everywhere.
property.name: Travelling Merchant

property.description: The underground world has much to discover - you'll love it!
property.name: Underground Adventurer

property.description: Before heaven destroys something, it first drives it mad!
property.name: Boar Man Spy

property.description: The canyon is crawling with poisonous creatures - don't venture in without sufficient strength!
property.name: Canyon Guard

property.description: Come experience the thrill of instant teleportation!
property.name: Map Teleporter

property.description: Take money, eliminate troubles! My goal is to be a mercenary who satisfies employers!
property.name: Mercenary

property.description: Never let the enemy cross our defense line.
property.name: North Gate Guard

property.description: Never let the enemy cross our defense line.
property.name: South Gate Guard

property.description: Our small village doesn't have enough troops, otherwise we'd beat these half-beastmen into submission.
property.name: Militia

property.description: Challenge the strong from all over the world; uphold the swordsman's virtue!
property.name: Wandering Swordsman

property.description: Ensure the general and brothers can safely retreat from the second underground floor.
property.name: Entrance Guard

property.description: Never let these skeleton soldiers escape the cave!
property.name: Cave Garrison General

property.description: Know yourself and your enemy to win every battle!
property.name: Bone Cave Spy

property.description: All soldiers stand ready in formation, heed this urgent command...
property.name: Demon Sealing Master

property.description: There are so many monsters here, how can I find my fellow disciples? Can anyone help me?
property.name: Senior Brother

property.description: Ten years to forge a sword? Joking - am I that slow a blacksmith?!
property.name: Weapon Shop Owner

property.description: Master, Senior Brother, the Junior Brother was captured by monsters...
property.name: Second Brother

property.description: Which path is correct? This one? That one? It's hard to tell...
property.name: Junior Brother

property.description: So many bugs in the Bug Pit; if they revolt, the consequences would be unimaginable...
property.name: Guard

property.description: Investigate things to gain knowledge! I'm not an impractical bookworm...
property.name: Scholar

property.description: Only through trials of blood and fire can one become an excellent soldier!
property.name: Frontline Soldier

property.description: Restoring Tianjicheng's glory is our generation's duty!
property.name: Tianjicheng Lord

property.description: These boar men have gone mad - be very careful when operating here!
property.name: Pig Cave Guard

property.description: Buying all types of herbs - fair prices for young and old!
property.name: Herbal Merchant

property.description: The village entrance has been unsettled lately; we need to be extra careful.
property.name: Village Gate Guard

property.description: A beautiful life starts with great clothes!
property.name: Clothing Shop Owner

property.description: Good accessories are not only beautiful, they also greatly enhance stats!
property.name: Jewelry Shop Owner

property.description: This store sells mixed goods, all quality items!
property.name: General Store Owner

property.description: Not enough inventory space? Store things you don't need in the warehouse!
property.name: Storage Manager

property.description: My duty is to pass on the powerful skills of predecessors to every newcomer!
property.name: Bookstore Owner
